interface.shortDescription: ModernUO and Ultima Online development guidance for RebirthUO.
interface.longDescription: ModernUO provides focused Codex skills for RebirthUO server work, including GitHub issue triage into source-backed implementation plans with explicit code-change rationale, publish-to-era measurement checks, and citations limited to repo, internet, or issue-supplied evidence, custom content module setup, test naming normalization for AI-generated xUnit files, classes, and methods, migration guidance, cross-era change routing, LootPack source preservation, symbol discipline for constants, variables, fields, properties, and Policy* surfaces, named Ultima Online skill, spell, and item property parity checks, evidence-backed era parity reports with expected-vs-actual data deltas, content parity checks, subsystem audits, serialization, timers, networking, regions, combat, crafting, loot, quests, housing, skills, stats, and related Ultima Online domain research.
defaultPrompt: Triage this GitHub issue into a source-backed implementation plan.
Check this Ultima Online content parity with source-backed data deltas.
Review this content change for cross-era parity impact.
Review this source-derived loot change before replacing LootPack calls.
Review this code for unnecessary constants, locals, fields, properties, and Policy* symbols.
Check Magery skill parity against ModernUO.
Check Flamestrike spell parity against ModernUO.
Check Spell Damage item property parity against ModernUO.
Normalize these ModernUO test file, class, and method names.
Set up a CUOContent custom module for this ModernUO server.
